title: Possibility to waive rules with source code matcher (spyglass integration)
body:
Verilator has great linting support and several ways to configure what rules to ignore (lint_off waiver), see https://veripool.org/guide/latest/exe_verilator.html#cmdoption-arg-lint_off

We already have a lot of inline comments to waive errors in the commercial lint tool `spyglass`, which means the source code might look like:

```verilog
module mem #(
   parameter integer DATA_WIDTH = 16  // spyglass disable W175
)
(
   input wire in,
   output wire out
);
   assign out = in;
endmodule
```

It would make it easier to start using verilator as lint tool if it support some configuration to waive rules depending on source code match, something like

```
`verilator_config
lint_off -rule UNUSEDPARAM -source-match "spyglass disable W175"
```

Verilator can already ignore based on line numbers, but I haven't seen anything like above. It would be a great feature.

If it's already possible but I just missed it, I apologize.
